description_long: This is a stylized stone tombstone set on a rectangular base, with a weathered greenish hue and subtle mossy textures. The front face features a prominent skull and crossbones relief, carved deeply into the stone, giving it a foreboding and iconic appearance. The edges of the tombstone are slightly chipped and irregular, suggesting age and exposure to the elements. Small stone debris and flecks of moss are scattered around the base, enhancing the sense of neglect and decay. The sides and back are plain, with the stone's rough texture and greenish patina continuing uninterrupted. The overall form is solid and blocky, typical of grave markers found in older urban cemeteries or haunted-themed parks.
description: A weathered stone tombstone with a skull and crossbones relief, mossy green patina, and scattered debris at its base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the skull and crossbones relief and chipped, mossy stone surface.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the tombstone's thickness and plain, rough stone texture.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain stone surface and visible base, lacking any engravings or reliefs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the tombstone's depth and greenish patina.
